Legal

Terms of Service

Coming before launch.

The Cricket Times Terms of Service are being prepared and will be published before the site's full public launch. They will cover the rules and expectations that govern your use of cricketimes.com — including subscription terms, comment guidelines, contributor relationships, intellectual property, and limits of liability.

In the meantime, the following baseline terms apply to anyone using this site:

Baseline terms (interim)

Copyright. All site code, content, design, and original editorial material are © 2026 Cricket Times. All rights reserved. Site code, content, and design may not be copied, republished, scraped, or used to train machine-learning systems without prior written permission.

Third-party data. Test match and player records are compiled by Ananth Narayanan and used with permission. Cross-reference data from Cricsheet is used under ODC-BY 1.0.

Comments and reactions. By posting a comment, you agree that the comment is your own, accurate to your knowledge, and not unlawful. Cricket Times reserves the right to remove comments at any time for any reason, including violation of decency, accuracy, or relevance.

No warranty. Statistics, analysis, and editorial content are provided as-is. Cricket Times makes best efforts toward accuracy but does not warrant that every figure is current or error-free. Do not use this site as the sole basis for financial, betting, or fantasy-cricket decisions.

The full Terms of Service will replace this page when ready. For licensing inquiries, partnership questions, or anything else that needs a written response, please contact ivan@cricketimes.com.

Last updated: 5 May 2026.
